sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52528" key="kalamo/krinon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμό-κρῐνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, prob. <sense id="n52528.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κάλαμος ἀρωματικός</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.132</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
